programme.title: The House Next Door: Meet the Blacks 2

programme.title: Warm Bodies
programme.desc: A zombie and an uninfected girl form an unlikely relationship.

programme.title: Scary Stories to Tell in the Dark
programme.desc: On Halloween, Stella and her two friends meet a mysterious drifter and uncover a sinister notebook of stories.

programme.title: Ninja
programme.desc: While studying Ninjutsu in Japan, Casey is asked by his Sensei to return to New York to protect the legendary Yoroi Bitsu, an armored chest that contains the weapons of the last Koga Ninja.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Following a traumatic experience, former Special Forces member Dean Cage (Wesley Snipes) is trying to pick up the pieces of his fractured life. With the help of detective Amy Knight (Jacqueline Obradors), Dean tries to block out the painful wartime memories, including the death of his best friend. Everything goes awry, however, when Dean is mistaken for a rogue CIA agent. He is abducted and given a truth serum, and now he must find an antidote to the debilitating psychotropic drug.

programme.title: Post Impact
programme.desc: In 2012, a meteorite collides with Earth, unleashing an ecological catastrophe that destroys civilization and tosses the planet into a bleak ice age. There are pockets of survivors, however, spread across the snowy planet. Among them is Capt. Tom Parker (Dean Cain), former head of security at the U.S. Embassy in Berlin, and his second-in-command, Sarah Henley (Joanna Taylor), who lead a team of scientists on an expedition into Europe to find whatever survivors there may be.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Retrograde
programme.desc: Two opposing time travelers are sent back to the present to prevent a global biological disaster from occurring.

programme.title: CA$H
programme.desc: In this crime thriller starring Sean Bean and Chris Hemsworth, a down-and-out couple finds a briefcase of money that solves all their problems — until a menacing stranger forces them to commit armed robberies to pay it all back.

programme.title: Labyrinth
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Sarah is given thirteen hours to solve a labyrinth and rescue her baby brother.

programme.title: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: After personal and professional setbacks, a woman experiences an alternate reality.

programme.title: The Rebound
programme.desc: In New York City, a single mom captivates her new neighbor, a much younger man.

programme.title: Perfect
programme.desc: An inside look into the world of modern journalism... and another world... looking for perfection... and finding only emptiness. Edited for TV

programme.title: Lone Star State Of Mind
programme.desc: A young Texas mechanic (Jackson) tries to save a dim-witted relative from the mob. There's also something about the murderer of the mechanic's father, who's been in prison for 20 years, thanks to his testimony as a child.

programme.title: Felon
programme.desc: A suburban family man is convicted of manslaughter and sent to prison, where he becomes caught up in the vicious cycle of corruption and violence.

programme.title: Suspect
programme.desc: A public defender pokes into places she shouldn't while trying to exonerate an innocent man accused of murder. Edited for TV

programme.title: American Madness
programme.desc: An idealistic banker battles the Great Depression, a conservative board of directors and a crooked executive's inside job in order to help his struggling customers.

programme.title: Scandal Sheet
programme.desc: A newspaper editor's efforts to end his ex-wife's blackmail attempt become the focus of an investigative story by his ambitious protégé.

programme.title: Berserk!
programme.desc: The sexy owner of a small traveling circus is under suspicion when the circus becomes plagued by a spate of murders.

programme.title: Phffft!
programme.desc: After eight years of marriage, Robert and Nina divorce. He takes up with his womanising Navy buddy Charlie Nelson while she looks to her interfering mother for guidance. Both start dating other people, but although they try and ignore each other whenever they accidentally meet, it is obvious the past is not dead. Then one night they find themselves in a nightclub doing the mambo together.

programme.title: Love Has Many Faces
programme.desc: Complicated love story of a millionairess married to a beach bum.

programme.title: The Exorcist III: Legion (Director's Cut)
programme.desc: William Peter Blatty's director's cut of "The Exorcist III" which was thought to be lost. Recovered and released in 2016 under its original title, this is the definitive cut of the film based on his novel "Legion".

programme.title: King Kong Lives
programme.desc: Kong falls from the twin towers and he appears to be alive. However, his heart is failing, so it's replaced with an artificial one. All is well until he senses that there's a female Kong somewhere out there and escapes wreaking havoc.

programme.title: The Brood
programme.desc: A man tries to uncover an unconventional psychologist's therapy techniques on his institutionalized wife.

programme.title: The General
programme.desc: When Union spies steal an engineer's beloved locomotive, he pursues it single-handedly and straight through enemy lines.

programme.title: Lancaster Skies
programme.desc: Douglas Miller, a broken, solitary Spitfire ace who survived the Battle of Britain, transfers to Bomber Command, determined to take the war to the skies over Nazi Germany.

programme.title: War On Everyone
programme.desc: Two corrupt cops set out to blackmail and frame every criminal unfortunate enough to cross their path.
A naïve young man assumes a dead man’s identity in order to join an underworld game of Russian roulette.

programme.title: Blood Out
programme.desc: Michael goes undercover to take justice into his own hands after his brother is murdered by a gang.

programme.title: Freelancers
programme.desc: When Malo joins the NYPD, he is taken in by his murdered father’s old partner and a team of rogue cops.

programme.title: Set Up
programme.desc: After a heist, a man is betrayed and vows to get revenge, joining forces with a ruthless crime lord.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Salvation
programme.desc: A foster child bonds with a snake-handling Pentecostal community but uncovers sinister truths. She must choose between reporting pastor's crimes or preserving her newfound support system, risking personal safety for a sense of belonging.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Escape From Mogadishu
programme.desc: Rival diplomats from North Korea and South Korea become trapped as civil war rages in Mogadishu, Somalia. With no aid from either government, their only shot at survival requires uniting with bitter adversaries to escape.

programme.title: Legend of Gatotkaca
programme.desc: Legends collide as young Yuda wrestles to unlock newfound god-like powers, defending his world in an endless battle against ancient and powerful evils.

programme.title: A Legend
programme.desc: An archeologist notices that the texture of the relics discovered during the excavation of a glacier closely resembles a jade pendant seen in one of his dreams. He and his team then embark on an expedition into the depths of the glacier.

programme.title: Broken Sword Hero
programme.desc: A young runaway grows into a legendary fighter in the combat sport of Muay Thai.

programme.title: Cellmate Secrets
programme.desc: Smith's former cellmates discuss her surprising antics behind bars.

programme.desc: Cindy finally finds love again but her wedded bliss soon turns dark.

programme.title: Abducted: The Carlina White Story
programme.desc: Starring Aunjanue Ellis, Keke Palmer, and Sherri Shepherd.

programme.title: Abducted: The Mary Stauffer Story
programme.desc: Mary Stauffer and daughter's harrowing abduction, held for seven weeks.

programme.desc: Smith's former cellmates discuss her surprising antics behind bars.

programme.title: A Rose For Her Grave: The Randy Roth Story
programme.desc: Cindy finally finds love again but her wedded bliss soon turns dark.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Tiny’s bar will close unless he pays $17K; customers rally to save it. Meanwhile, Jay’s hazing alarms.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Alan handles Women’s Lit as Tiny’s Place plan is approved.

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.title: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A cop-turned-writer creates suspicion when she publishes her first novel.

programme.title: Love and the Radio Star
programme.desc: Hired to rebrand a radio show, Savannah finds herself falling in love after working with the host.

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.title: The Last Black Man in San Francisco
programme.desc: Jimmie & his best friend Mont try to reclaim the home built by Jimmie's grandfather, launching them on a poignant odyssey that connects them to their past, even as it tests their friendship & sense of belonging in the place they call home.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Falcon Rising
programme.desc: Former Marine John "Falcon" Chapman is a dark anti-hero driven by guilt and suffering from PTSD, who will destroy himself unless given something else to destroy - a useful weapon-of-last-resort for the U.S. State Department.

programme.title: Traffickers
programme.desc: Tiffany Cooper, disgraced by the military, wanted by the cops and running out of time, stops at nothing to take down a Trafficking Operation and save these young girls. Nothing is what it seems when everyone seems to be against you. Trust No One.

programme.title: American Honey
programme.desc: Star (Sasha Lane), an adolescent girl from a troubled home, runs away with a traveling sales crew that drives across the American Midwest selling subscriptions door-to-door. Finding her feet in this gang of teenagers, one of whom is Jake (Shia LaBeouf), she soon gets into the group's lifestyle of hard-partying nights, law-bending days and young love.

programme.title: Dope Boy Magic
programme.desc: In the rough streets of Lumberton, NC, Mario wants to take the fastest path possible to a better life. Growing up with a father who was a pimp and a mother who was a prostitute, he only saw the worst in humanity on a nightly basis. Failing out of school and penniless, the only options were selling drugs, and theft. He started out breaking and entering, robbing trailer homes of known dope boys, who take notice and action.

programme.title: Counterplay
programme.desc: Antwan Walker and his beautiful wife Nia have the perfect marriage. When Antwan’s wandering eye leads him to flirt with his co-worker Monica, what follows is a psychological thriller as Antwan slowly realizes that Monica has a hidden agenda.

programme.title: Thick Trip
programme.desc: Four close-knit friends, all single and yearning for a change, embark on a summer-long 'Queen's Trip' to South Padre, Houston, and the untouched wilderness. As they travel and experience the vibrant cultures and breathtaking landscapes, they confront their fears, rediscover their passions, and explore their own wild sides.

programme.title: The House on Adams Drive
programme.desc: Sean is convinced the only way to keep the woman of his dreams happy is by obtaining as much money as possible. His friend Kordell, who’s an adult film star, helps him with a way to make a lot of money overnight. When they’re sent to a house to possibly film a scene, that turns out to be a real life exorcism.

programme.title: 100 Ghost Street: The Return of Richard Speck
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators confront the ghost of Richard Speck at the site of his heinous crimes.

programme.title: The Land That Time Forgot (2024)
programme.desc: Based on the gripping Science Fiction adventure. Present Day. Survivors of an American military vessel sunk by a Russian sub manage to capture the Russian sub after it surfaces. But now out of fuel, the sub makes its way to a tropical island. As those in the sub explore the island, they realize it is full of previously thought to be extinct creatures like dinosaurs, forcing them to survive the creatures and work together along with those who already live on the island to figure out a way off.

programme.title: Apocalypse Pompeii
programme.desc: When Mt. Vesuvius erupts, a vacationing former SPECIAL OPS commando must rescue his trapped wife and daughter.

programme.title: Battle Star Wars
programme.desc: An evil Coalition leader threatens to destroy a Rebel planet. His daughter joins the Rebels against him.

programme.title: Titanic II
programme.desc: History threatens to repeat itself during a voyage to commemorate the liner's 100th anniversary.

programme.title: 30,000 Leagues Under the Sea
programme.desc: A modern retelling of the classic tale, Cpt. Nemo uses his high-tech sub to wreak vengeance on the surface.

programme.title: Ox-Head Village
programme.desc: After watching a viral video, a woman, who believes that she's the twin of one of the participants, decides to investigate the town where the video was shot. From the Director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Pennywise: The Story of IT
programme.desc: This in-depth look at the 1990 mini-series based on Stephen King's iconic novel features interviews with many of the cult classic's key players, including director Tommy Lee Wallace and cast members Seth Green, Richard Thomas, and Tim Curry, who portrayed the notorious monster clown, Pennywise.

programme.title: The Girl Who Got Away
programme.desc: Elizabeth Caulfield, a woman who kidnapped five young girls and pretended they were her own, is sent to jail. Only one girl, Christina Bowden, managed to get away. 20 years later, Caulfield has escaped from prison in search for Christina.

programme.title: Ox-Head Village
programme.desc: After watching a viral video, a woman, who believes that she's the twin of one of the participants, decides to investigate the town where the video was shot. From the Director of The Grudge.

programme.title: Ruin Me
programme.desc: Welcome to Slasher Sleepout: The Ultimate Horror Movie Experience combining camping, haunted houses, and an escape room into one extreme 36-hour event. Six strangers are hooded, dropped in the middle of the woods, and must survive a simulated horror movie. Alexandra, the only participant who has never even seen a horror film, reluctantly tags along with her boyfriend. But when the other campers start to die before their eyes, Alex becomes the star of her worst nightmares.

programme.title: Hunter Hunter
programme.desc: A mysterious predator eludes an aging detective and a cunning outdoorsman to corner and terrorize a woman and daughter trapped in a remote forest cabin.

programme.title: The Furies
programme.desc: When Kayla wakes up in a coffin-like box in the middle of the woods, the first thing she sees is a terrifying masked man with an axe running straight for her. As she runs to try to get away, she realizes she is part of an insane and deadly game. There are six other women running scared in the woods, each with a masked assassin assigned to protect them and kill everyone else. Kayla races to save herself and as many women as she can, but when they start to turn on each other, her killer instinct is unleashed as she does whatever it takes to survive.

programme.title: Skull: The Mask
programme.desc: An ancient artifact known as the Mask of Anhangá possesses and forces those who wear it to carry out visceral sacrifices in gruesome fashion in this splatter-filled supernatural slasher.

programme.title: Ranger, The
programme.desc: After fleeing to the woods to lay low from the cops, Chelsea and her pals must play by the deranged park ranger's rules or they'll never make it out.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Chickadee Returns" - Jethro thinks he's in love with Chickadee Laverne, a stripper he met at the bank. She and the Clampetts have meet and have different ideas about what an "engagement" is, while Miss Hathaway tries to avert this disaster.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampette Look" - Cynthia Fenwick makes her filthy rich mother dress in the "Clampett Look" when they visit the Clampetts, since she thinks Elly is a fashion maven. That only reinforces the Clampett's belief that the Fenwicks are poor.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Garden" - Grannie has everyone up at the crack of down to plow the front yard for her garden, while Mr. Drysdale, Miss Hathaway, and a stubborn mule try to stop her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Gets the Misery" - Jed cheers up Granny by pretending to be sick so she can doctor him. Soon Drysdale and his doctor, Clyburn, are subject to her methods as well.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro brings home a friend, Armstrong Dueser McHugh III, who is coddled by a chauffeur who treats him as frail. The Clampetts know better, and show him a good time, friendship and family.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Miss Hathaway gets sick and Mr. Drysdale has to speak at a conference, Jed helps out by running the bank and having Elly be his secretary, while Jethro finds a speech that Drysdale accidentally uses instead of his own. All the while a new teller sucks-up to the men and flirts with the women.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Psychiatrist Gets Clampetted" - Jethro finally gets his bill of health from Dr. Twombly so he can graduate the fifth grade, but Twombly really wants to talk to Grannie again. Drysdale brings him to the Clampetts' just as Grannie showed Pearl how to use a love potion, so everyone thinks Twombly's interest in Grannie is love.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Psychoanalyzed" - Jethro needs a health certificate to graduate from the fifth grade, so he goes to the only doctor the Clampetts know about - Mrs. Drysdale's psychiatrist. He gets nowhere with Jethro, so Pearl comes and she thinks he is testing her virtue when he tries to lay her on his couch.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts in Court" - When a couple who ran into the Clampett's car discover that they're rich, they fake injuries and sue the Clampetts.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Entertain" - Jed arranges a party to get Grannie out of her doldrums and invites the Drysdale. But when Mr. Drysdale's boss comes and wants to meet them for dinner, he wonders if he's going to be sent to an Alaskan bank when his boss finds out he's been lying about Jed and his family being sophisticated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Duke Becomes a Father" - Mlle. Denise comes back for the birth of her dog's puppies, and to see Jed. They do some "courtin' and sparkin'" Mrs. Drysdale isn't nearly so happy when she finds the puppies share more in common with Duke the bloodhound than Claude the poodle.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts and the Dodgers" - Jed and Jethro go golfing with Leo Durocher, coach of the Los Angeles Dodgers, who wants to recruit Jethro as a pitcher when he sees how well he can throw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Abe Lincoln's claim that he's the Great Emancipator amuses everyone except Matt Yordy.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark Twain visits North Fork and quickly alienates the townspeople.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to stop embittered John Holliver from venting his wrath on the people who expelled him from town years before.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: The Monster Jam action intensifies as elite drivers push their trucks to the edge in a high-energy showdown packed with momentum swings and jaw-dropping saves. Racing, skills, and freestyle runs collide as rivalries heat up and the leaderboard stays in constant motion, with massive air, hard landings, and razor-thin margins separating the field. programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly earns his Gay Soup Diet credentials by making a hearty Chickpea and Ditalini Pasta Soup that he insists is both deeply comforting and genuinely slimming for January. Michael Symon and Carla Hall join in for a lively episode about winter blues, childhood thermostat disputes, and the surprisingly emotional power of a good bowl of soup.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon elevates the humble chicken tender by using a feta brine to infuse the meat with tangy, salty flavor before breading and shallow-frying to golden perfection. He finishes the dish with a bold hot honey sauce made with Calabrian chili, creating an indulgent yet sophisticated take on a crowd-pleasing classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall tackles a Fan Fridge from a viewer in Ohio, transforming ground beef, mashed potatoes, and pantry staples into a warming Shepherd's Pie-inspired casserole layered with sautÈed vegetables and finished with a cheesy potato topping. The hosts weave in a thoughtful conversation about grace, kindness to strangers, and the community spirit of how neighborhoods once raised children together.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon each take a third of the same chocolate sheet cake and decorate it their own way, creating three wildly different showstopping desserts in one episode. Clinton goes peanut butter, Carla goes Black Forest-inspired with sour cherry, and Michael goes coconut ganache ó proving that one bake can launch a thousand creative directions.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his beloved Mini Marsala Meatballs, mixing beef and pork with breadcrumbs soaked in milk and browning them until golden before finishing them in a rich marsala-mushroom sauce. The hosts discuss proper meatball technique, family traditions around Sunday gravy, and the surprising versatility of marsala wine in savory cooking.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his beloved Tuscan White Bean Stew with chicken sausage, onions, and celery while welcoming sports broadcaster Marysol Castro ó the first female and Latina PA announcer for the New York Mets ó as a special guest. Bean Week reaches its emotional peak as the hosts discuss baseball basics, recent life milestones, and the deeply satisfying power of a vegetable-forward winter meal.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall makes a warmly spiced Moroccan Apple Crumble with dates, cardamom, and cinnamon, building a simple crumble topping using a foolproof ratio formula and serving it with a dollop of cr√ãme fra√ìche for an elegant finish. The hosts discuss the art of checking doneness by eye rather than timer, date farming in California, and Carla's personal decision to embrace her natural gray hair.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall kicks off Bean Week with her Black Bean Empanadas, stuffing golden, flaky pastry shells with a richly seasoned black bean filling that proves legumes can be just as craveable as meat. The hosts celebrate the internet's enthusiastic response to Clinton's Bean Week proposal and dive into the week with maximum enthusiasm.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes his deeply satisfying Pasta e Fagioli during Bean Week, building a thick, soul-warming pasta and bean soup that he considers one of the greatest cold-weather dishes ever conceived. The hosts debate the pronunciation of Italian words in Italian-American households and celebrate the cultural heritage behind this Roman classic.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Bean Week reaches its triumphant finale as Clinton Kelly makes a Chickpea Pasta and Chocolate Chip Cookies while a special musical surprise celebrates Carla Hall's lifelong dream of being honored Broadway-style. The hosts reflect on Bean Week's unexpected viral success and welcome a composer to help mark the occasion.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon makes Super Bowl Smash Burgers inspired by Carla Hall's hilarious hotel window-smashing incident the night before, breaking down his technique for maximum crust, cheese lace, and game-day efficiency. The hosts debate double-bun etiquette, share tips on underrated herbs, and tackle fan questions about making the most of a large Parmesan wedge.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: "The Past, Present, and Future of Food Writing" - Plus, the diet changes that aging brings, being the Tom Brady of eating, and how to update the James Beard Foundation Awards for our times.

programme.title: Majordomo Cookbook Club
programme.desc: Majordomo Cookbook Club - Grilled Branzino with Chimichurri: Australian chef Josh Niland shares his masterful fish butchery techniques to elegantly breadown a branzino, perfeclty cook it in a cast iron pan, and serve it with a mouth-watering chimichurri sauce.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Chicken-Bacon-Ranch “Larb”: Andrew prepares a dish from Dinner Time Live that is a testament to ranch dressing. More specifically, a testament to the holy trinity of chicken, bacon, and ranch. This riff on larb is full of flavor and meat. "Riff” because larb is the national dish of Laos — as well as a very popular dish in northern Thailand — and this is by no means an authentic larb. But… is it delicious? Yeah, it is.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Oyakodon & Mortadella Sandwich: Chris Ying cooks a Japanese dish called Oyakodon that he made for his buddy David Chang on a recent episode of Dinner Time Live. Oyakodon translates to “parent and child bowl” and refers to the main ingredients: chicken (the parent) and egg (the child). Chicken thighs and sliced onions are simmered in seasoned dashi, then covered in egg, which forms a custard-y blanket to be served over rice. Chris and Andrew make a Dinner Time Live recipe based on one of David Chang's favorite sandwiches in the world: a cheesy, hot, mortadella sandwich. This version has a twist—a Chinese steamed bun as a tribute to Momofuku's famous pork buns.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Lobster, Corn & Melon Salad, Spicy Seafood Boil, Ramen Rockefeller: Andrew makes the refreshing Lobster, Corn & Melon Salad from the Summer Menu episode of Dinner Time Live; Chris and Andrew make the Spicy-Tingly Seafood Boil and Ramen Rockefeller from the Epic Combos episode.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipe - XO Fries & Crispy Shrimp Rolls - Chris and Andrew make two more recipes from Dinner Time Live with David Chang: XO Fries and Crispy Shrimp Rolls. The XO Fries start with a bed of golden French Fries, then topped with a pile of Chinese BBQ pork and covered with a savory, slightly spicy XO sauce (made from dried seafood, ham, shallots and chili oil). The Crispy Shrimp Rolls are inspired by the famous crispy shrimp tacos from Mariscos Jalisco—a legendary food truck in LA.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind The Counter With Dave Chang: The Spring Menu - An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on a Springtime inspired menu for guests Maya Rudolph and Ron Funchess. Dishes include: pea and mint soup, truffled egg toast, crab cakes with warmed artichoke and ramp salad, and roast lamb chops with spätzle and braised morels.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter with David Chang - Classic Comforts: An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. This episode sees Dave working on a "Classic Comfort Foods" menu for NBA legends Reggie Miller and Mark Jackson. Dishes include: Caesar salad, New England clam chowder, fettuccine alfredo, salmon with caper-butter sauce, a potato rösti, and a chocolate tart.

programme.title: Behind the Counter with David Chang
programme.desc: Behind the Counter with David Chang - Fish on the Menu: An unfiltered behind-the-scenes look into David Chang's kitchen as he and his team develop and practice a unique menu in the days leading up to the next Netflix episode of Dinner Time Live. In this episode, Dave is creating a "Fish on the Menu" theme for Emily in Paris stars Lily Collins and Ashley Park. Dishes include: Hwe (two ways), Uni & Chickpeas, an Ode to Noma's Langoustine, Roasted Flounder, Fish Soup with Rice and Pickles, and Flottante.

programme.desc: Miami Dolphins superfan Seth Farmer and his girlfriend, Julia Thompson, inspire Emeril's tailgating creations.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: For the next tailgate, take a cue from Emeril's home team the New Orleans Saints.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: Nothing says Washington, D.C. like Emeril's crispy chicken wings with mumbo sauce.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: For a Carolina-inspired tailgate, wow your guests with Emeril's take on some hometown faves.

programme.title: Emeril Tailgates
programme.desc: For a Seattle style tailgate, Emeril whips up his crowd-pleasing cedar planked salmon.

programme.title: Emeril Cooks
programme.desc: Emeril's friends Maggie Long and Cyrus Lester share a meal incorporating fresh mushrooms from their farm.

programme.title: Great Chefs of America
programme.desc: Recipes included with this episode: Foie Gras with Spicy Lobster Toast, Braised Striped Sea Bass and Artichokes, and Tarte aux Poires Alexandre Chabert. Restaurants include: Zealous in Chicago, Gramercy Tavern in New York, and Maurice French Pastry in Metairie.

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann teaches her Scuola Culinaria student, Karen the traditional Italian culinary secrets of creating soft-as-a-cloud, pillowy gnocchi every time. When they’re as perfect as these Amalfi-style gnocchi, all that’s needed is a buttery, heavy cream sauce of asparagus tips and lemon zest to make you close your eyes, take one taste and swear you’re in Amalfi.

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann and eager Scuola Culinaria student John roll up their sleeves and dive into the essential steps need to create an all-time favorite of favorites, Pizza Margherita. Step by step, sauce by sauce, cheese by cheese learn how to take your pizza all the way from yeast to “Yay!” And they’re not done yet, not until they make Fried Dough with Cinnamon and Sugar from yeast to “Yum!”

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann teams up with Executive Chef David Crinieri to wow her cooking students by exploring the world of perfect pestos. Chef David leads off with a delicate Watercress Pesto tossed with Fresh Spinach Linguine and topped with an Artichoke Crudo. Mary Ann’s up next with her signature Broccolini and Artichoke Pesto tossed with Fusilli. Want perfect pesto every time? Try either one—or both!

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann teaches her Scuola Culinaria students how to make a beyond-moist-and-tender Apricot Yogurt Pound Cake. Next up, she prepares a classic Italian Pound Cake with a sweet/tart taste of lemon zest and lemon juice. In for a penny, in for a pound with two great dessert cakes fit for any occasion, including fit for a king.

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann reveals the secret to Crepes in Chicken Broth: make the savory broth from scratch with fresh ingredients and elevates the very versatile crepe to new heights. Then...never heard of Tomato Marmelade? Mary Ann show her students how tomatoes, grated ginger, a clove-dotted onion, sugar, and—surprise!—balsamic vinegar—make a terrific topping for fresh ricotta, bruschetta, or cheese.

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann’s cooking student Erica creates a mouth-watering Cherry Focaccia from start to finish. From making a sweet dough from scratch to topping it with slow-cooked Bing Cherries, it’s the perfect indulgence for a special day—or any day. Next up, Mary Ann shifts gears from sweet to savory with a Focaccia Barese, topped with fresh cherry tomatoes and Castelvetrano olives. Focaccia? Gotcha!

programme.title: Ciao Italia
programme.desc: Mary Ann and cooking school owner Joe Faro prepare a classic, mouthwatering Tagliatelle alla Bolognese. While the sauce slowly simmers down to becomes rich, dark, and complex, Joe makes fresh tagliatelle pasta, taught to him by his grandmother. When the moment arrives to combine the two, a marriage made in heaven is the only way to describe how it looks and what’s more, how it tastes!

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits a famous local marble sculptor en route to visit an old friend and great cook, where she learns the secrets of pinched sweet cheese cakes, ancient sesame-honey confections and more. Back in her own kitchen, she creates a luscious Tinos-style artichoke bread pudding and red mullet in caper sauce, both Tinos traditional specialties.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: On Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet life and food of its local farmers, in contrast to the reputation as a dazzling party island. She tastes onion pie, delicious cured pork, and one of the oldest cheeses in the world, kopanisti, still made on the island. In the kitchen, she makes a garlicky local pasta recipe, and a traditional Greek island fish soup.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Gorgeous cafes, bustling nightlife, yachting and water sports, just 20 minutes south of the Greek capital, Athens. Diane visits a fish market where the catch is right off the boat, sails the coast, and returns to her kitchen to create three delicious, contemporary Greek recipes, inspired by the cosmopolitan bustle and fun-loving spirit of the Athenian coast.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores everything from beguiling mastiha, to the local pasta to unique tomatoes, dangling like giant rubies against the renowned geometric patterns on medieval houses of Pyrgi. The flavors of historic Chios inspire her to cook up a succulent chicken and quince dish and an easy traditional black eyed pea salad with Mastiha vinaigrette.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Naxos is famed for the quality of its meats, its array of cow's milk and sheep-and-goats' milk cheeses and for its potatoes. Diane heads from the shore straight to a remote mountain hideaway with Alexis in tow, where two local cooks await them with a feast of stuffed lamb, potatoes, and a unique skillet pumpkin-onion pie.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Near the historic Bay of Navarino, blanketed by olive, citrus trees and home to historical culinary artifacts unearthed in prehistoric clay tablets at Pylos, Diane cooks with two village ladies, making a local pork and fig dish, and olive-oil fried bread. Inspired by the cornucopia of olive oil, oranges and other local delicacies, she cooks up a Messinian meal.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: The second-largest Greek island and an hour from Athens, Diane heads out in search of mushrooms with a local mushroom forager and cultivator. They cook a favorite local recipe "kritharoto," mushrooms with orzo. Diane makes three delectable dishes with mushrooms, wine and local ingrediants, inspired by the flavors of this nearby "secret" land.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: A wedding spins into chaos as a giant ring escapes, but Big Wing’s catch saves the day and unveils a joyful bride. Later, Jett and Golden Boy use Cross Combo power to tame a hungry dino plant and rescue Golden Girl and Runi.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a kite to a boy named Akas in the Himalayas, who wants to fly it in a kite festival. Red Pandas take off with the kite and Jett pursues them. When he runs into trouble and gets pinned under a rock, Dizzy shows up with her rescue gear to save the day.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett goes to Venice, Italy with a mask for Luca to wear at his masquerade party. Jett and Luca set out on a gondola to deliver the invitations, but when they run into a waterway traffic jam, Paul must show up to unclog the canal traffic.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Princess Maribelle from England asks for sparkly collars for her puppies to wear at her royal tea party. When the puppies escape and run every which way through the garden, Jett and Jerome join forces to round them up.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Riley from Hollywood is directing his first action film. Jett brings an alien mask and ends up acting as the monster. Riley’s demands get out of hand, so Jerome comes to co-star and help him bring about a peaceful ending.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes a pair of running shoes that light up to Lorna in Kenya. She’s going to run in a big race. While training she crosses paths with a lost baby wildebeast. Bello comes to play a game and reunite the baby with its parents.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett has a feathered headdress for Camila from Brazil. She’s dancing the samba in a Carnival parade. Jerome comes to help her with her dance moves and Jett uses his Jett Speed to fix Camila’s float when it suffers a breakdown.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Drew in Canada asks for ice skates so that he can play on an ice hockey team. When he gets to the rink he’s so nervous that he can’t play. Former Mountie Grand Albert gives Drew confidence-boosting tips so he can score the big goal.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Yuri from Russia is part of a family circus. He needs a unicycle for his act on the high wire. The rest of the family is on their way when the circus train breaks down. Jerome performs an amazing act for the crowd while Jett goes to help them.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Karl from Norway asks for a Viking helmet. He goes to Viking Camp where Jett is mistaken for a dragon. The campers chase Jett onto a ship that heads for a waterfall. Mira comes and pushes them away from disaster.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Martine in Paris, France needs a cake-decorating machine. Her father the baker asks her to ice a giant cake for a party at the Eiffel Tower. When the cake is ready the traffic is terrible. Dizzy flies the cake through the sky over the city.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Vietnamese sisters Sen and Kim are fans of pop star Kellie. They ask for wigs like the one their idol wears. When Kellie’s van gets stuck in a rice paddy, Dizzy comes to lead the way to the concert and the sisters are Kellie’s special guests.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett takes brushes to Willem in The Netherlands who is going to paint a mural on a sea wall. When the mural is almost done, a storm approaches. Jett and Donnie borrow the propeller from a windmill to dry the painting before it is ruined.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jerome thinks Jett’s job is easy so he takes his place. He delivers a bathtub to Nayan in Thailand. Boonying the elephant takes a bath but is startled by a spray of water and runs off. Jett arrives to help bring Boonying back.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett carries tires to Alex and his sister Adriana in Monaco. They’ve built a hot dog car for Alex to ride in a soapbox derby. When ducks cause him to run off the course and into town, Paul comes and leads him back with a police escort.

programme.title: Super Wings
programme.desc: Jett brings a battery to Noah in Denmark, who’s built a dinosaur out of plastic blocks. When they power it up the dinosaur escapes and runs through the town. Donnie comes and builds another robot to confront the dinosaur and remove his battery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the moment babies are born, they use their developing senses to discover the world. In terms of sight, bold patterns in contrasting colors or black and white are initially preferred. As for sounds, Mother s gentle voice, in any language, is music to baby's ears. Language Nursery: Voices From Many Lands acquaints your baby with the sounds of foreign language by presenting delightful, visually stimulating images accompanied by spoken passages, natural sounds and music.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Ocean Explorers
programme.desc: Cal, Neptune, Opus, Dean, Tinker and others learn about the flora and fauna of the ocean through STEAM-based principles and real-life footage.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Join our playful puppet host, Bard the Dragon, on a fun-filled adventure using everyday words such as flower, cat, and moon, and beautiful scenery from nature. World Of Words lets you and your little one share the excitement of discovering new words together!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Share a rainbow of sights and sounds with your baby as you discover the wonders of color together! Join puppet host "Vincent Van Goat" as he creates six Van Gogh masterpieces exploring red, green, blue, yellow, orange, and purple. World Of Colors is a spirited celebration of creative expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies grow, their eye-hand coordination begins to improve as their ability to interact with their surroundings blossoms. It is the perfect time for My First Signs, A playful introduction to 20 common words and phrases from baby's world -- including ''mommy'', ''daddy'' and ''I love you'' -- both Spoken and in Sign Language.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Cars & Trucks Formation For Kids
programme.desc: A transport adventure for all! Have fun with the cool cartoon cars while they are magically formed and are off to perform their day’s duty. Children’s love for cars and trucks and everything in between fulfilled in this action-packed playlist. Watch as the garbage truck, fire engine, police car, and more transportation come together to keep their city clean and safe.

programme.title: Super Supremes Wheels On The Bus & More Popular Kids Song
programme.desc: Do you kids know Wheels on the Bus? Learn this classic nursery rhyme with The Supremes, plus many other fun songs and dances.

programme.title: Shapes Songs and More Learning Nursery Rhymes
programme.desc: Learning time made fun and easy! This compilation is all about the different shapes we see around us everyday a Triangle, Square, Circle, Rectangle and lot more through kids songs and nursery rhymes.

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus Nursery Rhymes For Children - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Wheels on the bus is a nursery rhymes that little babies love! Come join Little Treehouse as they sing, dance in this fun kids educational video with our version of the classic wheels on the bus called the wheels on the bus and many more preschool rhymes for babies like rain rain go away, row row your boat, head shoulder knees and toes and many more

programme.title: Top 10 Nursery Rhymes - Kids TV
programme.desc: Kids songs and nursery rhymes that your little one will love! Come join us, as they sing along, dance in this fun kids videos. Learn preschool songs like This is the way, Old Macdonald, Humpty Dumpty, Five little babies, Twinkle Twinkle, Wheels on the Bus, Finger Family and more.

programme.title: Wheels on the Bus & More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Welcome to the mystical and of the Little Treehouse! where you are take non magical nursery rhymes journey. Kids will laugh, dance, sing, and play along with our video, learning kids songs like I spy song, to market to market, animals sounds song, mary had a little lamb, row row row your boat and much, much more while enjoying our friendly characters.

programme.title: Road Rangers Car Cartoons
programme.desc: Enjoy Road Rangers popular family friendly kids stories & adventure Nursery Rhymes for babies and toddlers. Your children will learn essential lessons like problem solving, working together, family bonds along with numbers, colors, shapes, abc and much more in this popular tv kids adventure series.

programme.title: Wheels On The Garbage Truck + More Nursery Rhymes - Little Treehouse
programme.desc: Hey Kids, Little Treehouse is back with more nursery rhymes for toddlers that you will enjoy. Wheels on the Garbage Truck is here to take you on a fun ride where we sing-along, dance and have fun.Come join in this preschool adventure and enjoy it with your friends. Little Treehouse has some amazing animated learning videos and more baby rhymes collection like,Who Stole My Toy, Happy Elephant, Chew Your Food, Doctor Checkup Song, Swimming Song, Peek A Boo, Rock a Bye Baby and many more Kindergarten Songs.

programme.title: Sonic the Hedgehog

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While in the midst of a cake decorating demonstration at the café, the girls are uncharacteristically interrupted by an excited Princess Berrykin. She announces the Berrykins have decided to revive the old tradition of the Berry Bitty Buggy Derby. While the girls enthusiastically recount the stories they've heard about it and ask the Princess questions, Blueberry, carrying enough books to block her view, comes through the door and unknowingly interrupts the Princess.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The grove around Berry Bitty City is abuzz with activity. The Berrykins are using their sparkles to harvest berries, Berrykin Bloom is in his garden spraying flowers with a special solution to make them larger, and Raspberry is nearby gathering flower petals to make perfume. The wind starts to blow and picks up some of the sparkles. The sparkles float along the wind and get combined with some of Berrykin Bloom's solution.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The girls are all gathered at the café. Strawberry is experimenting making applesauce from scratch with a mallet (and making a mess) while the rest busily make their own wrapping paper and bows for the annual gift exchange they hold in celebration of First Frost. Mr. Longface stops by and Strawberry offers him some fresh applesauce but he declines, as he doesn't care for it. He's only there for some tea and, being that he's new in town, doesn't know what the group is up to.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While working in her store, Orange overhears the Berrykins laughing and shouting outside. When she goes to the door to investigate, a clump of dandelion fluff gets blown inside chased by three Berrykins. She watches as they head butt the clump around until it floats back toward Orange. Just as it floats close, she gives it a bat sending it outside and the Berrykins happily chasing after it. Wanting in on the fun, she joins them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While enjoying lunch in the café, the girls are interrupted by some music coming from the gazebo. They head outside and find Sadiebug and Kadiebug wearing badges and standing by a banner and podium. A group of chairs are set up in front of them. The twins begin to announce, and then argue, that they are starting a club - a good citizens club. The girls are shocked as the twins argue with each other all the time.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With all the Baby Berrykins running around Berry Bitty City, Princess Berrykin decides to build a Day Care Center and playground. But she's worried because it's dull-looking - all grey metal and brown wood. She asks Strawberry whom might be good to help her out. And two names immediately come to her mind - Lemon and Raspberry! The Princess confesses she's always admired their sense of design and style.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Finding she has some free time one morning, Strawberry visits Berrykin Bloom who is filled with excitement over his new crop of Berry Bitty fruits and vegetables; his garden has never grown so much produce! He can't wait to share his new crop (the perfect bitty size) with Berry Bitty City, so Strawberry volunteers to help him transport the produce to Orange's General Store.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest; she wants to fit in and contribute to the community.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Berry Bitty City is holding its first city-wide talent show! Hearing that it's the music students of superstar Cherry Jam, a talent scout from Big Bitty City plans to show up. Strawberry and her friends excitedly anticipate her arrival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With the summer almost over, Blueberry overhears Strawberry talking about a wonderful tropical island and believes her friend is going to surprise them all with a much needed vacation! Blueberry makes the other girls promise to keep the secret until Strawberry reveals the big surprise. Of course, even though they've promised to keep the secret, they can't help but try and suss out what the island's like from every little thing Strawberry does.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's the last week of summer and Berry Bitty City is hopping with activity as the girls prepare for their tropical island vacation at Berry Breezy Bay Resort. But just as they're about to leave, bad news: the resort is closed for the season due to berry breezy weather. The girls are disappointed, but Orange isn't giving up. She says if they can't go to the tropical island, maybe they can bring the tropical island here!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With only a few days of summer left, the girls are about to enjoy their first vacation in their newly-created, tropical beach resort at Berry Bitty Lake, when who should descend upon them but Mavis Maraschino, the comically over-the-top "Entertainment Tonight"-style show host. Mavis has dumped her focus on fashions in favor of an even glitzier show called Lifestyles of the Berry Big Bitty Stars, and she wants her first segment to be about how pop superstar Cherry Jam spends her vacation.

programme.title: Hitler's Mein Kampf: Prelude to the Holocaust
programme.desc: While in prison for his role in the failed Beer Hall Putsch of 1923, Adolf Hitler composed the first of his two-volume work, Mein Kampf. In it, he revealed his desire to lead Germany to greater heights through a utopian vision of an Aryan nation free of Jews and encompassing greater territory through colonialism. When Hitler became Chancellor in 1933 and then Fhrer in 1934, his vision evolved into a dystopian nightmare with the onset of WWII and the Shoah/Holocaust. HITLERS MEIN KAMPF: PRELUDE TO THE HOLOCAUST explores whether Hitlers hateful racial beliefs set down in his manifesto laid the groundwork for the genocidal actions of the Third Reich.Through interviews with historians and experts, the film gives insights into the origins and evolution of Hitlers mindset about Germany and his image of leadership. Hitlers potent mix of ideas included Eugenics, 19th century racial studies and Social Darwinism, as well as political notions from Volk Ideologies. Scholars also reveal how Hitler used law, violence and propaganda to control the Volk along the genocidal path to the annihilation of the Jews, the disabled, and so-called half-breeds. Holocaust educators and historians note that anti-Semitism and white supremacy rear their ugly heads even today, capturing the films bookend images of rallies in Charlottesville, Virginia in 2017 and Atlanta, Georgia in 2018. HITLERS MEIN KAMPF: PRELUDE TO THE HOLOCAUST not only explores the question of how something like this could have happened, but also reveals the ways in which National Socialism could rise again today.

programme.title: Shanghai 1937: Where World War II Began
programme.desc: When did World War II begin? For Europeans, it was September 1, 1939 when Nazi Germany invaded Poland. Americans might say December 7, 1941the day the Japanese Imperial navy attacked the American naval base at Pearl Harbor, Hawaii. But in China, people will tell you a different dateAugust 13, 1937, the start of the Battle of Shanghai. That day, after what is called the century of humiliation, including six years of incidents initiated by the Japanese military, China at last stood up.At the time, Shanghai was the most international city in Asia with a large foreign population, so the military conflict made headline news around the world. Based on the book Shanghai 1937: Stalingrad on the Yangtze by Danish author Peter Harmsen, SHANGHAI 1937: WHERE WORLD WAR II BEGAN introduces key figures in the conflict, chronicles how the battle unfolded over the course of three months, and explores the aftermath and years of war that followed. SHANGHAI 1937 incorporates rarely seen archival footage as well as interviews with author Peter Harmsen, military historian Edward Drea and professor of modern Chinese history Hans Van DeVen, in addition to two Chinese experts on this subject: Su Zhiliang, Ph.D. of Shanghai Normal University, and Ma Zhendu, director of the Second Historical Archives of China. The film also includes vivid recollections of men and women who experienced these events as foreign children living in Shanghai.

programme.title: The Portillo Expedition: Mystery on the Bougainville Island
programme.desc: THE PORTILLO EXPEDITION: MYSTERY ON BOUGAINVILLE ISLAND examines the circumstances surrounding the death of Isoroku Yamamoto the Japanese WWII Admiral who planned the Pearl Harbor surprise attack and the Battle at Midway. Admiral Yamamotos plane, the Betty Bomber, was shot down by American P-38 fighter planes in 1943. Narrated by Gary Sinise, the documentary follows a crew of American explorers to the remote jungle of the western Solomon Islands, where they search for the wreck of the Betty Bomber sparking a further quest to understand what they find there.

programme.title: Since: The Bombing of Pan Am Flight 103
programme.desc: Terrorism is seen as a present-day epidemic, but the families of the 270 victims of Pan Am Flight 103 have lived with it for decades. Bound together by tragedy when a bomb ripped the New York-bound 747 jumbo jet into pieces over Lockerbie, Scotland just before Christmas in 1988, the Flight 103 families faced one traumatic injustice after another. From the early days when an unprepared U.S. government left the relatives to fend for themselves against a greedy, once-iconic airline, to the modern era, when the only man convicted of the crime was set free in a backdoor oil deal with Libyas infamous dictator, Muammar Gaddafi, the families refused to go down without a fight, harnessing the power of the media in their war for truth and justice.SINCE: THE BOMBING OF PAN AM FLIGHT 103 is a feature length documentary that tells the emotional story of some of these first victims of terrorism, who proved that ordinary people can accomplish extraordinary feats in the wake of politically-fueled mass murder.

programme.title: Rise of the Freemen
programme.desc: This documentary follows the unbelievable and obscure story of the longest armed standoff in FBI history. For 81 days, a heavily armed militia group known as the Montana Freemen and hundreds of FBI agents eyed each other across a desolate Eastern Montana prairie. Many predicted the standoff would end in violence, but ultimately, the Freemen surrendered peacefully, after undercover FBI agents led them to a meeting point where they were arrested.The real story however, occurred years before the tense standoff. RISE OF THE FREEMEN investigates the roots of the anti-government group in the 1990s as well as the desperation and ideology that laid the foundations for the Freemen. Using never before-seen-FBI images, documents, and archival footage the film follows the rapid escalation of threats and violence against elected officials and the media, the sprawling bank fraud case, and the dramatic undercover arrest of Freemen Leaders that sparked the standoff.

programme.title: Dad's Secret War: France 1944
programme.desc: Narrated by actor Kevin Bacon, Dad’s Secret War: France 1944 focuses on two top-secret World War II organizations – the OSS (Office of Strategic Services) and the British SOE (Special Operations Executive), American and British organizations responsible for silent, unseen, highly classified missions of critical importance to defeating the Nazis. The documentary shares the riveting, true story of an American who joined the British SOE and was parachuted into France with a small team just after D-Day to organize the French Resistance into a cohesive army. The mission was to stop Germany's most feared troops from reaching Normandy in the days after the D-Day landings of June 6, 1944.

programme.desc: The beloved traditional yule log that started it all. Gentle flames dance over seasoned wood, filling your home with nostalgic warmth and timeless holiday comfort.
